name: Dark Contract with the Eternal Darkness
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>常</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>契</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>約</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>やく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>書</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you have 2 "D/D" cards in your Pendulum Zones, your opponent cannot target monsters on the field with Spell/Trap effects, Tribute them for a Tribute Summon, nor use them as Materials for a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Summon. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.
eff: While you have 2 "D/D" cards in your Pendulum Zones, your opponent cannot target monsters on the field with Spell/Trap effects, Tribute them for a Tribute Summon, nor use them as Materials for a Fusion, Synchro, or Xyz Summon. Once per turn, during your Standby Phase: Take 1000 damage.

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
summoning: Cannot be used as a Fusion Material
Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Cannot be used as an Xyz Material
